products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) These Triple Stitch™ low-top sneakers in workwear blue suede calfskin are incredibly light and flexible. This pair is completed with a Foliage-colored leather lining.

products.title: Zegna Triple Stich leather sneakers "Beige"
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) A perfectly sleek silhouette from Italian designer Zegna, the Triple Stitch sneakers draw their name from three crossover laces upon the vamp – capturing the refined aesthetic that the brand is renowned for. Luring you in through the grained leather upper and sumptuous touch of suede trims, this pair will instantly enrich any casual ensemble.

products.title: Zegna Suede Triple Stitch Espadrilles "Black"
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Zegna’s Triple Stitch sneakers have become something of a staple among those in the know, with their signature crossover elastic laces and clean lines. products.title: Zegna SECONDSKIN Triple Stitch leather sneakers Light Grey"
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) The light grey Triple Stitch™ SECONDSKIN sneakers are crafted from specially selected calf leather for even more flexibility. The brand’s signature triple-crossed elastic detail ensures an easy slip-on fit, while evoking the traditional hand-stitching of tailored jackets to symbolize and honor Zegna’s legacy of fine craftsmanship. The super soft, light uppers are complemented by a white rubber sole. The Triple Stitch™ SECONDSKIN Shoes result from over a century of generational craftsmanship, the sharing of wisdom and dedication to innovation. Crafted from our SECONDSKIN leather, they feature a remarkable 'memory' that ensures a glove-inspired fit — making them ideal for travelling in exceptional style and comfort.
